creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
net-p2p/py-bittorrent-devel has not been updated in a long time, and in
the net-p2p/py-bittorrent port has a newer version out.  Since there is
no visible development branch I'm recommending that this port be marked
as DEPRECATED with an expiration date one month from now.  I'm willing
to take maintainership of the port until it is removed in case anyone
wants to speak up about it.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
